items.title: Report: Chiefs will visit Bills on Thanksgiving night
items.summary: Patrick Mahomes and Josh Allen will meet again this November.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Saudi Arabia set to launch Dunes League T20 in October
items.summary: It will be Saudi Arabia's first franchise league, and is expected to feature retired internationals who are still active in the franchise circuit
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.

items.title: Robertson to referee Celtic v Hearts title decider
items.summary: Don Robertson will take charge of Saturday's Scottish Premiership decider between Celtic and Hearts at Parkhead, with Kevin Clancy named as the VAR.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.
